s-1.ptxt: INSPECT FRONT DIFFERENTIAL SIDE GEAR BACKLASH

s2.ptxt: Hold the front differential pinion to the front differential case side. Using a dial indicator, measure the front differential side gear backlash.
If backlash is out of specification, install proper side gear thrust washers.

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT FRONT DIFFERENTIAL PINION THRUST WASHER

s2.ptxt: Using a micrometer, measure the thickness of the front differential pinion thrust washer.
If the thickness is less than the minimum, replace the front differential pinion thrust washer.

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT NO. 1 FRONT DIFFERENTIAL PINION SHAFT

s2.ptxt: Using a micrometer, measure the outside diameter of the No. 1 front differential pinion shaft.
If the outer diameter is less than the minimum, replace the No. 1 front differential pinion shaft.
